_comment: Appends multi-token aliases to attune-help corpus entries without requiring an attune-help release. Mirrors the summaries_override.json mechanism. Aliases are added in addition to (not replacing) the frontmatter aliases. Each appended alias must be 2+ tokens after the retriever's tokenizer + stemmer so it can clear KeywordRetriever.MIN_ALIAS_OVERLAP=2. Within-template duplicates against frontmatter are silently deduped at load time; cross-template alias collisions raise DuplicateAliasError as usual. Origin: docs/specs/alias-expansion-sweep/tasks.md per-cluster sweeps (bug-predict M2 / security-audit M3 / ...). Each alias was pre-validated with attune_rag.retrieval._tokenize against the cluster's paraphrased misses to clear MIN_ALIAS_OVERLAP=2.
